title: Irish Biryani Rice Bowl
description: A twist on traditional biryani, this vegetarian dish combines the flavors of Ireland with the spices of India.
instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic, cooking until softened.
Add biryani masala powder, cooking for 1 minute.
Add carrots and green beans, cooking until tender.
Add rice and vegetable broth, bringing to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, covering and simmering for 18-20 minutes.
Fluff rice with a fork, topping with cubed soda bread.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
